Partitions data into k clusters by minimizing within-cluster variance. Iteratively updates centroids. Fast but sensitive to initialization and outliers. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Machine Learning **🔗 Related Concepts:** - machine learning - supervised learning - unsupervised learning
